stemHtml: What is the maximum bank angle in segments 1 and 2 for a standard take-off procedure and what, if any, is the effect on stall speed and V2? The maximum bank angle is…

options.a: 0° and NO changes to the stall speed or V<sub>2</sub>.
options.b: 20° and leading to a 6.5% increase in stall speed and a 6.5% increase in V<sub>2</sub>.
options.c: 15° only leading to a small increase in stall speed and, potentially, an increase in V<sub>2</sub>.
options.d: 25° and leading to a 10.4% increase in stall speed and a 10.4% increase in V<sub>2</sub>.
